channel.title: Whalesbook Financial News
channel.description: Latest Indian and global financial market news

item.title: SEBI Overhauls Municipal Bonds to Boost City Funding, Faces Hurdles
item.description: India's market regulator SEBI has proposed significant changes to boost municipal bonds and fund city infrastructure. Key reforms include allowing bond refinancing, setting standard face values, and offering investor perks. These steps aim to overcome investor caution caused by governance issues, which have historically limited the market's growth to about ₹45 billion over nine years.

item.title: MakeMyTrip Powers India's Next Billion Users with AI Assistant Myra 2.0
item.description: MakeMyTrip has launched Myra 2.0, a new AI travel assistant designed for easy voice and text bookings. It aims to connect with users in India's Tier-2 cities and smaller towns. The AI handles millions of customer chats each quarter and shows higher booking success, especially with voice commands in non-metro areas. This move uses AI to grow market share among new travelers, as the Indian online travel market expands, though the company faces competition and scrutiny over tech company valuations.
